title: kyaLabs Agent Identity Extension
description: UCP extension schema for io.kyalabs.common.identity. Defines the payload an agent includes in the checkout request under the 'io.kyalabs.common.identity' key.

token.description: ES256-signed JWT issued by kyaLabs. Verify locally against JWKS at kyalabs.io/.well-known/ucp. See reference/verify.ts for the verification algorithm.

kid.description: Key ID used to sign the token. Matches a key in the issuer's JWKS, discoverable via the OAuth authorization server metadata.
